tagline: Your Policy Should Work as Hard as You Do
hero_subtitle: Since 1991, Kevin Dougherty and Marcella Grunert have delivered no-nonsense insurance for Illinois families and businesses. Independent agents, dozens of carriers, one goal — your best rate.
address: 1000 Jorie Blvd., Suite 109, Oak Brook, IL 60523
service_area_description: Serving clients across Illinois, Wisconsin, and Indiana from our Oak Brook office.
seo_title: KSD Insurance Agency | Independent Insurance in Oak Brook, IL
seo_description: KSD Insurance Agency has provided independent home, auto, business, and life insurance in Oak Brook, IL since 1991. Get competitive rates from dozens of carriers.
services_subtitle: Personal and commercial insurance from an independent agency that shops the market for you.
reviews_subtitle: Same owners since 1991. Same commitment to finding you better coverage at better rates.
cta_heading: Get a free policy audit. Most clients save money.
cta_subtitle: Book a no-obligation review. We'll compare your current coverage against dozens of carriers.
footer_description: Independent insurance agency in Oak Brook serving Illinois, Wisconsin, and Indiana since 1991.

services_featured.name: Home Insurance
services_featured.description: Guaranteed replacement cost, sewer backup, earthquake, jewelry, and fine arts coverage — customized for Chicagoland homeowners.

services_featured.name: Business Insurance
services_featured.description: Custom commercial packages for restaurants, contractors, manufacturers, retailers, and mixed-use buildings of every size.

services_secondary.name: Auto Insurance
services_secondary.description: Competitive auto rates from multiple carriers including Erie, Progressive, and The Hartford.

services_secondary.name: Life Insurance
services_secondary.description: Term and whole life policies for income replacement, debt payoff, education funding, and estate planning.

services_accent.name: Workers' Compensation
services_accent.description: Mandatory coverage for job-related injuries and illnesses. We find the right policy for businesses of every size.

services_wide.name: Commercial Auto Insurance
services_wide.description: Protect your fleet and business vehicles from accidents, vandalism, and uninsured motorists.

about_features.title: Trusted Choice Agency
about_features.description: Certified Trusted Choice member — independent agents bound by a code of ethics and consumer advocacy.

about_features.title: Same Owners Since 1991
about_features.description: Kevin and Marcella have been here from day one. You'll speak with the same people who built this agency.

about_features.title: Dozens of Carriers
about_features.description: We represent Erie, Progressive, The Hartford, CNA, AmTrust, and many more — so you get the best rate, period.

reviews.name: Patricia M.
reviews.text: Kevin has handled our home and auto for over 15 years. Every renewal, he shops it again to make sure we're getting the best deal.

reviews.name: James & Donna K.
reviews.text: Marcella helped us bundle our business and personal policies. Saved us a fortune and the coverage is actually better.

reviews.name: Tony R.
reviews.text: When I had a fender bender, they handled the entire claim for me. I barely had to lift a finger. This is what insurance should be.
